protein_name: Blocks the elongation and depolymerization of the actin filaments at the pointed end. The Tmod/TM complex contributes to the formation of the short actin protofilament, which in turn defines the geometry of the membrane skeleton. Belongs to the tropomodulin family. Neuronal-tissue specific. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Molecular Function: actin binding; protein binding; tropomyosin binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: actin filament organization; muscle contraction; myofibril assembly; nervous system development; pointed-end actin filament capping
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: MGC39481; N-Tmod; Neuronal tropomodulin; NTMOD; TMOD2; tropomodulin 2; tropomodulin 2 (neuronal); Tropomodulin-2
raw_fields.Basal Isoelectric point: 5.21 Predict pI for various phosphorylation states
